title: Xtra Crispy Malaysian Egg Frittata
description: A sweet and crispy Malaysian dish featuring eggs and ferment-kimchi, cooked to perfection in a binchotan-grill
instructions: Preheat the binchotan-grill to medium-high heat
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, salt, and black pepper
Add the chopped ferment-kimchi, diced onions, minced garlic, and grated ginger to the bowl and stir to combine
Heat the coconut oil in the preheated binchotan-grill
Pour the egg mixture into the grill and cook for 2 minutes
Use a spatula to gently lift and fold the edges of the frittata towards the center
Continue cooking for an additional 4 minutes, or until the eggs are almost set
Sprinkle the ground turmeric over the top of the frittata and cook for a final minute
Remove the frittata from the grill and let it cool for a minute before slicing and serving
